zh.lifeSummary: 當William Pyne IV於1316年出生在英國戴文韋斯特 唐時，他的父親William De Pyne III31歲，母親Isabel of Bradwell27歲。他於1343年與Joan Brightley在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1374年享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: Pyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Pine  . This name has been established in Ireland since the 16th century.

variants.name: Pine
meanings: English: from Middle English pin(e) (Old English pīn, Old French pin), a topographic name for someone who lived by a conspicuous pine tree or in a pine forest; in some cases it may originally have been a nickname for a tall man, one thought to resemble a pine tree.
English: nickname from Middle English pine ‘pain, injury, torture, punishment, infirmity’, referring to someone who suffered from an inflicted pain or punishment.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Le Pin in Calvados or some other French place called from a prominent pine.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William Pyne IV was born in 1316, in West Down, Devon, England, his father, William De Pyne III, was 31 and his mother, Isabel of Bradwell, was 27. He married Joan Brightley in 1343, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1374, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Pyne IV est né en 1316, à West Down, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William De Pyne III, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabel of Bradwell, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Joan Brightley en 1343, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1374, à l’âge de 58 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William Pyne IVが1316年にイギリスデボンウエスト ダウンで生まれた時，父William De Pyne IIIは31歳，母Isabel of Bradwellは27歳であった。1343年にイギリスイギリスデボンでJoan Brightleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1374年に58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Pyne IV(이)가 1316년 영국 데폰 웨스트 다운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Pyne III(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel of Bradwell(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1343년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Joan Brightley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1374년 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Pyne IV родился в 1316 г. в местности вест доун, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени William De Pyne III было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel of Bradwell, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Brightley в 1343 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1374 г. в возрасте 58 лет.
